meta.title: What is a hypersonic cruise missile anyway?
meta.description:
There are two kinds of modern hypersonic weapons, hypersonic glide vehicles hypersonic cruise missiles. To date, no nation has managed to field a hypersonic cruise missile just yet. 
#shorts #hypersonic #hypersonics #hypersonicmissile #hypersonicmissiles #airpower
